Assessment.description: One criterion assessment without a final certification decision.
Assessment.title: Assessment

CancelRunResponse.description: Acknowledgement of a cooperative cancellation request.
CancelRunResponse.title: CancelRunResponse

CompletionDecisionRequest.description: Administrator completion command; actor identity comes from auth.
CompletionDecisionRequest.title: CompletionDecisionRequest

EducationEnrollmentCreateRequest.title: EducationEnrollmentCreateRequest

EducationEnrollmentView.description: Authorized enrollment view with local repository paths removed.
EducationEnrollmentView.title: EducationEnrollmentView

EducationManualConfirmationRequest.title: EducationManualConfirmationRequest

EducationProgram.description: Immutable program blueprint selected when a learner enrolls.
EducationProgram.title: EducationProgram

EducationProgramView.description: Immutable education program without a deployment-local source path.
EducationProgramView.title: EducationProgramView

EducationProjectBindRequest.title: EducationProjectBindRequest

EducationRevisionRequest.description: Shared optimistic-concurrency input for enrollment mutations.
EducationRevisionRequest.title: EducationRevisionRequest

EducationScoreRequest.description: Record an authorized score against one configured requirement.
EducationScoreRequest.title: EducationScoreRequest

EnrollmentStatus.description: Program progression state with a mandatory human completion gate.
EnrollmentStatus.title: EnrollmentStatus

EvidenceLocator.description: Auditable source location with a short allowed excerpt.
EvidenceLocator.title: EvidenceLocator

ManualConfirmationRequirement.description: An instructor, mentor, or administrator confirms an activity.
ManualConfirmationRequirement.title: ManualConfirmationRequirement

MilestoneCompletionRule.description: Small allowlisted rule; arbitrary expressions are intentionally unsupported.
MilestoneCompletionRule.title: MilestoneCompletionRule

MilestoneKind.description: Allowlisted milestone capabilities available to a course designer.
MilestoneKind.title: MilestoneKind

MilestoneProgress.description: Generated learner goal and its current evidence state.
MilestoneProgress.title: MilestoneProgress

MilestoneProgressStatus.description: Runtime status of one generated learner goal.
MilestoneProgressStatus.title: MilestoneProgressStatus

PipelineCatalogResponse.description: Deterministic catalog of allowlisted local pipelines.
PipelineCatalogResponse.title: PipelineCatalogResponse

PipelineDescriptor.description: Small serializable catalog entry for delivery adapters.
PipelineDescriptor.title: PipelineDescriptor

PipelineJobStatus.description: Durable queue lifecycle independent from the pipeline result status.
PipelineJobStatus.title: PipelineJobStatus

PipelineRunRequest.description: Transport options plus one pipeline-specific JSON payload.
PipelineRunRequest.title: PipelineRunRequest

PipelineRunStatus.description: Persisted lifecycle of one local pipeline execution.
PipelineRunStatus.title: PipelineRunStatus

PipelineRunView.description: Filesystem-neutral execution result safe for HTTP delivery.
PipelineRunView.title: PipelineRunView

Problem.description: RFC 9457-shaped error body with AXCalib-stable machine codes.
Problem.title: Problem

ProgramCompletionDecision.title: ProgramCompletionDecision

ProgramLevelSpec.description: Ordered group of milestones representing one course level.
ProgramLevelSpec.title: ProgramLevelSpec

ProgramNotificationRecord.description: Administrator completion request retained on the enrollment.
ProgramNotificationRecord.title: ProgramNotificationRecord

ProgramStatus.description: Lifecycle of a program definition, not a learner certification decision.
ProgramStatus.title: ProgramStatus

ProjectArtifactView.description: Hash metadata safe to return without a deployment-local URI.
ProjectArtifactView.title: ProjectArtifactView

ProjectExecutionView.description: Progress summary that deliberately excludes free-form notes and mentor identity.
ProjectExecutionView.title: ProjectExecutionView

ProjectRegistrationRequest.description: Register a staged PPTX without accepting a caller-controlled local path.
ProjectRegistrationRequest.title: ProjectRegistrationRequest

ProjectRegistrationResponse.title: ProjectRegistrationResponse

ProjectResourceView.description: Authorized current project state with every deployment-local URI removed.
ProjectResourceView.title: ProjectResourceView

ProjectStageView.description: Review-gate state without report paths, snapshots, rationale, or source text.
ProjectStageView.title: ProjectStageView

ProjectStatusRequirement.title: ProjectStatusRequirement

RegistrationDecisionRequest.description: Administrator registration command; actor identity comes from auth.
RegistrationDecisionRequest.title: RegistrationDecisionRequest

RequirementResult.description: Auditable observation for one configured requirement.
RequirementResult.title: RequirementResult

ReviewerAdjustment.description: Criterion-level human correction that never rewrites the Agent report.
ReviewerAdjustment.title: ReviewerAdjustment

ScoreRequirement.description: A trusted evaluator records a score against an explicit threshold.
ScoreRequirement.title: ScoreRequirement

StagedArtifactRef.description: Opaque reference to bytes already accepted by a deployment staging service.
StagedArtifactRef.title: StagedArtifactRef

ValidationIssue.description: Redacted validation location and code without rejected input values.
ValidationIssue.title: ValidationIssue

info.summary: Authenticated HTTP parity for allowlisted AXCalib pipelines
info.title: AXCalib Runtime API

202.description: Pipeline command durably queued for a local worker

x-axcalib-contract.artifact_boundary: opaque staged artifact ID with byte-size and SHA-256 verification; caller local paths are forbidden
x-axcalib-contract.authority: verified principal, role, resource assignment scope, organization, revision and domain HITL guards are all required
x-axcalib-contract.scope: pipeline catalog/run/status/cancel plus principal-bound project registration/HITL decisions and education enrollment/milestone commands
